meta.title: Global AI Pre-IPO / Crossover Pipeline
meta.purpose: Investor-readable Global AI Pre-IPO / IPO Pipeline OS: company-first table, relationship routes, source registry, missing data and IC readiness.
meta.coverage: Updated from 2026-06-18/19 conversations: crossover funds (Coatue/Tiger/D1/Viking/ICONIQ/Sands/Altimeter/Greenoaks), Google/CapitalG/GV, Temasek, Taiwan ESB/pre-IPO, Korea/Japan, and prior AI app/infra list. PM v4 adds Delta View, Score Breakdown, and Deal Kanban with mobile-first cards. PM v5 adds IC View, Relationship Map, Task Aging, and One-Pager Queue.

items: IC View: Top 15 with Buy/Wait/Need Data/Advance decisions
Company One-Pager: thesis, valuation, risks, next call questions in detail cards
